title: Twin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Twin''' may refer to the following items:

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
*The biological phenomenon of '''[[twin]]s'''.
*The twins '''[[Terec]] and [[Ceret]]''', [[Kotabi]] [[Jedi]] [[bond-twins]] who lived during the [[High Republic Era]]
*'''[[Twins (star system)|The Twins]]''', a [[star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]]
*'''[[The Red Twins system]]''', a star system in the [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]]
*'''[[The Twins]]''', [[Hutt]]s who laid claim to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]'s criminal empire
*'''[[Lark and Jonk]]''', who was nicknamed "the twins"

=='''[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]'''==
===Individuals===
*The biological phenomenon of [[Twin/Legends|'''twins''']].
*'''[[Twin (Cerean)|Twin]]''', the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] girlfriend of [[Skeel (Cerean)|Skeel]].
*'''[[The Twins (Jedi)|The Twins]]''', a pair of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] whose personal attachments and passions consumed an entire world and transformed it into a [[Star/Legends|star]] long before the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].

===Astronomy===
*[[Twins (star system)/Legends|'''Twins''']], a violent [[Binary star system/Legends|binary star system]]
*'''[[Drudonna]]''' and '''[[H'gaard]]'''', two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] known as "'''The Twins'''"
*[[The Red Twins/Legends|'''The Red Twins''']], a binary star
*[[The Red Twins system/Legends|'''The Red Twins system''']], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]

=='''[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]'''==
*'''"[[THE TWINS]]"''', a ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]'' short film produced by [[Trigger (animation studio)|Trigger]]

{{Disambig}}
